content.speakerText: You said you collect vintage records—what’s the rarest one you’ve found?
content.speakerTextCn: 你说你收藏古董唱片，最稀有的是哪一张？
expectedAnswers: A 1969 pressing of Pink Floyd’s 'Dark Side of the Moon'—only 300 were made!
I found one by a local band from the '70s that no one’s ever heard of.
It’s a first edition of a Bob Dylan album with a misprint on the cover.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确指出具体物品（唱片名称、年份、特点）
是否提供稀有性或独特性细节（限量、错误、冷门）
是否使用自然口语节奏，避免书面化表达

content.scenarioHint: 在朋友分享他最近去徒步的经历时，你想深入了解他看到的风景细节，引导他描述当时的感受和发现
content.speakerText: You mentioned you saw a waterfall—how loud was it really?
content.speakerTextCn: 你提到你看到了瀑布——那声音到底有多大？
expectedAnswers: It was so loud I had to shout to be heard!
Not too loud—more of a gentle roar, like nature’s background music.
It was deafening! I could feel the vibration in my chest.
Actually, it was surprisingly quiet at first, then it hit me as I got closer.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否通过提问引导对方描述感官体验
语言准确性：语法和时态是否正确，用词是否恰当
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常对话习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了与感官描述相关的词汇（如loud, roar, vibration, quiet）

content.scenarioHint: 同事提到他周末在园艺中心买了新植物，你想了解他选择这株植物的原因和养护细节
content.speakerText: That plant looks amazing! What made you pick that specific one?
content.speakerTextCn: 这植物真漂亮！是什么让你选了这一款？
expectedAnswers: I loved the shape of the leaves—they look like tiny fans!
It was the only one that didn’t have brown spots, and I needed something low-maintenance.
I’ve been wanting a variegated plant for months, and this was the perfect match.
The seller said it thrives in indirect light, and my windowsill is perfect for it.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否通过提问引导对方分享选择动机和细节
语言准确性：语法和用词是否准确，是否使用了恰当的描述性语言
表达自然度：是否符合职场或日常社交中的自然回应方式
关键词覆盖：是否使用了与植物特征或养护相关的词汇（如leaves, low-maintenance, variegated, indirect light）
